chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO Cr. Transfer Appln. No. S-38 of 2025 Cr. Transfer Appln. No. S-43 of 2025 Date Orders with signature of Judge Cr. Transfer Appln. No. S-38 of 2025 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. Cr. Transfer Appln. No. S-43 of 2025 1. For orders on M.A No. 3218/2025. (Urgency Application) 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on C.M.A. No. 3219/202. (Exemption Application) 4. For hearing of main case. 03-07-2025 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, advocate for the applicant/complainant in Cr. Transfer Appln. No. S- 38/2025 Mr. Peerano Khan Jatoi, advocate for the applicant/accused in Cr. Transfer Appln. No. S- 43/2025 and for the respondent No.1/complainant in Cr. Transfer Appln. No. S-38/2025. Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Bhangwar, D.P.G for the State.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Khalid Hussain Shahani, J. Through this single order, I would like to dispose of two criminal transfer applications. Cr. Transfer Appln. No. S-38/2025 has been filed by applicant/ complainant Mst. Yasmeen Rasheed Baloch and Cr. Transfer Appln. No. S-43/2025 has been filed by applicant/accused Ghous Bux Tunio. Both the cases arise out of same crime bearing No. 10/2023 of P.S. Sachal for the offence U/S 354- A, 148, 149 P.P.C and 17/3 H.O. Through both cases, both parties have prayed for transfer of Sessions Case No. 435/2023 (Re: State Versus Ghous Bux & Others), from the Court of learned II-Additional Sessions Judge, Larkana to any 2 other Court having jurisdiction on the ground that learned trial Court is lying vacant since three months and this case pertains to the year 2023. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of private respondent/accused recorded his no objection if the above Sessions Case is withdrawn from the file of II-Additional Sessions, Larkana to any other Competent Court having jurisdiction.

Through both cases, both parties have prayed for transfer of Sessions Case No. 435/2023 (Re: State Versus Ghous Bux & Others), from the Court of learned II-Additional Sessions Judge, Larkana to any 2 other Court having jurisdiction on the ground that learned trial Court is lying vacant since three months and this case pertains to the year 2023. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of private respondent/accused recorded his no objection if the above Sessions Case is withdrawn from the file of II-Additional Sessions, Larkana to any other Competent Court having jurisdiction. Learned D.P.G has also recorded his no objection to the above proposal. Expeditious trial is fundamental right of every individual. It has come on record that the trial court is vacant. In view of the above circumstances and by consent of both the parties, instant transfer applications are allowed. The Sessions Case No. 435/2023 (Re: State Versus Ghous Bux & others), arising out of Crime No. 10/2023, offence under sections 354-A P.P.C, 17/3, H.O registered with P.S. Sachal, is hereby withdrawn from the file of learned II- Additional Sessions Judge, Larkana and entrusted to the Court of learned Sessions Judge, Larkana with directions to proceed with the matter himself or transfer the same to any other court having jurisdiction for its disposal in accordance with law. In view of the above, the both Criminal Transfer applications are disposed of along with listed applications. Judge Abdul Salam/P.A
